description: Fabric Reflex rules for market manipulation alerts from Eventhouse KQL queries.

triggers.name: Spoofing Alert
triggers.headline: Spoofing detected
triggers.message: Market surveillance detected spoofing activity in the latest Eventhouse results.
triggers.kql_query: detect_spoofing() | project event_time, exchange_id, broker_id, symbol, alert_type, severity, spoofing_score, cancel_rate

triggers.name: Layering Alert
triggers.headline: Layering detected
triggers.message: Market surveillance detected layering activity in the latest Eventhouse results.
triggers.kql_query: detect_layering() | project event_time, exchange_id, broker_id, symbol, alert_type, severity, price_levels, cancel_fraction

triggers.name: Wash Trading Alert
triggers.headline: Wash trading detected
triggers.message: Market surveillance detected wash trading activity in the latest Eventhouse results.
triggers.kql_query: detect_wash_trading() | project event_time, exchange_id, symbol, ultimate_owner, alert_type, severity, wash_count, wash_volume

triggers.name: Price And Volume Anomaly Alert
triggers.headline: Price or volume anomaly detected
triggers.message: Market surveillance detected a price or volume anomaly in the latest Eventhouse results.
triggers.kql_query: detect_anomalies_advanced() | project event_time, exchange_id, symbol, alert_type, severity, anomaly_score, model_used
